titleStmt.title: The Wreck of the South Pole, or the Great Dissembler
titleStmt.author: Hahn, Charles Curtz

publicationStmt.publisher: Digital Humanities Network at the University of Potsdam

encodingDesc.p: Tokenized TEI with vanilla <w> and <pc> elements.

front.p: THE WRECK OF THE SOUTH POLE

div.head: CHAPTER II.—THE FIGURE OF A MAN.
CHAPTER III.—I WISH TO TURN BACK.
CHAPTER VII.—A SOUTH POLAR WEATHER BUREAU.
